feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Payment APIs availability in S4 Hana Public Cloud to send the payment files to the Bank
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In our current implementation, we need the payment files (available under the Manage Payment Media app) in S/4 Hana Public Cloud to extract and send to the Bank (SFTP is what we are planning).

The Bank is located in France and the client is from the EU region.

We plan to use the BTP Integration Suite to do this. We are looking for the standard APIs to extract the files from the S/4 Hana PC that are available under the Manage Payment Media app.

We found an ODATA API (Payment Advice) that is used for supplier/customer payment advice but this is not useful as this is for Customers/suppliers.

We couldn't find the API service in standard and I need a way to do this integration between S/4 Hana PC and Banks leveraging the BTP Integration Suite.

Appreciate any pointers here and if this kind of integration was already done by anyone the steps of the process will be helpful for us.

Please let us know if there are any standard APIs or ways of extracting the files into the CPI from the S/4 Hana PC so we can integrate with the Banks or SFTP of the Banks.

If not APIs is there any other way that I can get these files sent over to the iFlows in Integration Suite to place them in the SFTP or send to the Banks automatically?

This is crucial and very important for the client implementation to go live.

Thank you,

Hanu

entry.title: Get All cost centers based on date&time creation through standard API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I'm trying to consume SAP "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" Web API that related to "Get cost centers" or "Get profit centers" by standard official SAP API links:

https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_PROFITCENTER_0001-v1/overview

https://api.sap.com/api/CE_COSTCENTER_0001/overview

Both web API services need to submit primary keys such as controlling area, Cost center id, and validity end date(please refer to attached screenshot)

Is it possible to retrieve all cost centers through the API that were created in my tenant (for integration and data mapping with an external system) without specifying the required request keys?

Thanks.

entry.title: Import Collection Dependency Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have 3SL Public Cloud system. In Q system, I discarded a collection which shouldn't be transported to P system.

Then I merged it with another collection. When I try to transport my new collection to P system, it gives below issue.

But as I said, It's already discarded. Why still check discarded collection with dependencies.

Now, this issue blocks my all custom logic and custom fields to move P system.

I try to make hot fix to move single object but still gives new errors by depending this discarded collection.

How can I solve this?

Thanks,

entry.title: App "Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax" - Fields Mapping
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

how does the value these fields in this App are defined?

User Field 1

User Field 2

User Field 3

User Field 4

User Field A

User Field B

User field C

User field D

User document ref1

User document ref2

in case we want to need to read data from billing document into these fields, which Badi we can do custom logic

kindly explain and support

Patrick

entry.title: Adding Value Help (additional annotations) to Generated CDS views
entry.content:
Hi Dear SAP Community,

We are currently trying to create a report using the "Manage KPI and Reports" app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

We followed these steps:

  1. Generate a custom CDS view using the "Custom CDS View" app.
  2. Create a query based on the CDS view in the "Custom Analytical Queries" app.
  3. Generate the report using the "Manage KPI and Reports" app.

Everything works fine until one of our customers requested value help for certain fields.

As seen, we don’t have any value help for the Project ID.

Below my demo Custom CDS view just to show what I tried.

Is there any chance of adding value help to this report, or are there possible extension options?

I tried to copy the generated CDS query and add value help there. Obviously, it didn’t work because we are not allowed to use unreleased objects.

 

Thank you very much in advance,

Best regards,

Rufat

entry.title: How to Create Custom field in Sales Quotation Item and Flow it to Subsequent Sales Order Item
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I got a requirement to Create a Custom field at Sales Quotation Item level and the Value Given at Quotation level should flow to subsequent Sales Order.

I tried creating Custom field through Custom Fields App in Key user extensibility and checked Business Context for Sales Quotation but didn't find. so tried creating field in Sales Document Item business context, the field is getting created in both Sales Quotation and Sales Order but the values which entered at Quotation level are not flowing to Sales order.

Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Extension field extension scenario in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Can anyone help me with the Extension field extension scenario in S4 Public Cloud .

which means I want to create extension fields on Material Master and extend it to purchase and sales orders.

I know about "Custom Field" app and tried the possibility there. In that I didn't find the business context to support my requirement.

Do someone have the similar requirement or solution from past ?

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) - how to get notes (item long text)?
entry.content:
Hi,

I've been trying to get notes (item long text) entered using GUI app Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) in S4 Cloud.

And I've seen this KBA 2971277 - Long text is not displayed in Manage Journal Entries.

But it doesn't say how I get the notes that I have entered. I want to find out if there is any CDS view that can support this.

Has anyone been able to get Item long text in FB70 in S4 Cloud?

Cheers,

Tri

entry.title: Custom Business Object: OData Service Not Generated After Enabling Back End Service
entry.content:
Issue:

I have created a Custom Business Object (YY1_TABLE_MM_001) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) and want to expose it as an OData service for API consumption. However, after enabling the necessary settings and publishing the object, the service is not being generated.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Open the Custom Business Objects app.
  2. Create or open the object YY1_TABLE_MM_001.
  3. Enable the following options:
    • ✅ "Back End Service"
    • ✅ "Can Be Associated with UI and Reports"
  4. Click Publish to activate the changes.
  5. Check for the generated OData service name under "Service Generation" – no service appears.
  6. Attempt to call the API endpoint:
    ruby
    CopyEdit
    https://my401583-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_TABLE_MM_001_CDS
    but receive an error stating that the HTTP method is not allowed.

Expected Behavior:

  • After enabling "Back End Service", publishing the object should generate an OData service.
  • The OData service name should be visible in the Custom Business Object settings.
  • The API should allow POST requests to create new entries.

Questions:

  1. Is there an additional step required to generate the OData service?
  2. Are there any restrictions preventing the service from being created?
  3. How can I verify whether the service is correctly generated and accessible?

entry.title: Purchase order price enhancement in S4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently trying to do an enhancement for PO price in S4 hana public cloud system, I don't find a appropriate BADI for price enhancement. Then I considered to put a routine in "purchasing price calculation schema", but I cannot find where to define the routine for purchasing price. 

Currently I assigned a "Routine" in the "Requirement" field, but based on the testing, this is not useful for PO.

 

Maybe because this Routine was defined under SD module, I defined the "Routine" and "Assigned the Enhancement ID to routine" in below path, based on the testing, it only works for SO.

Could you please help if you know how can I activate this enhancement to PO?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: What does "_bustT" in the field component Name of a custom field refer to?
entry.content:
I defined a Custom Field to add items to the BP master.
The created item (published) has not yet been added to the screen.
　Field Type：Code List(1)
　Identifier：YY1_C_COLL_MON_240
　Business Context：Master Data: Business Partner(BP_CUSTVEND1)

On another occasion, I used the API (A_BusinessPartner) to get data, and noticed that "_ bus" was added to the end of the component name of Custom Field.
In the app, the Custom Field has a Field Component Name of "_ bus" or "_ busT".

 


I assume these are retrieved via the API, but there is also a "_ busF" result from the API.
The items in the red frame in the image below.

 

If anyone knows what the "_ bus" at the end of these refers to (especially _busT and _busF) and what purpose it is given for?
Also, is there anything to be granted other than "_ xxT" and "_ xxF"?

entry.title: Custom API based on BO with custom (read) logic
entry.content:
To start with the big question:
Can I use both an existing BO interface and custom CRUD (so including Read) methods?
If not, is a completely unmanaged implementation the only feasible alternative?

And then for the bit of context:
We are currently in the process of moving several customers from their on-premise systems to the public cloud environment. The starting point of any public cloud implementation is "stick to standard", making use of public API's to interact with the SAP system.

In the past, they have of course used all the flexibility at their disposal, meaning loads of ZBAPI's to tackle client-specific logic. We can't completely remove all this logic, so are looking into our options to create custom APIs in which we can still adjust the behavior for all CRUD operations. Note the 'R' here, we also want to be able to adjust the data being retrieved during a READ operation.

An existing BO sounds like a great starting point, as the standard coding for CRUD should do fine in most cases and saves time. As a first go, I'm trying to create one for the Product BO, represented by I_ProductTP_2. To be able to filter on fields, I create a new root view entity with reference to that BO. By using an existing BO, it has to be a projection instead of a select.

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Product custom projection'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

define root view entity zp_product_custom
provider contract transactional_query
as projection on I_ProductTP_2
{
  key Product,
  ProductType,
  (...) etc.
}

Followed by a behavior definition, which in turn has to be of type projection as well:

projection implementation in class zcl_product_custom unique;
strict ( 2 );

define behavior for zp_product_custom alias Product
{
  use create;
  use update;
}

There is no 'read' behavior. That could only be added using an unmanaged implementation, but the projection part prevents me from using that type. Trying to implement a read method anyway, results in the message that "ZP_PRODUCT_CUSTOM" has the implementation type "projection", hence the implementation type "READ" is superfluous". Tried several approaches so far, all run into technical issues in the end.

Testing the custom API using Postman, I can use it to read data, that works out of the box with the default BO implementation. No method to adjust that data anywhere in the process so far. The create method would possibly work, but Postman is giving me some trouble there... let's say that's a work in progress. Focusing on the read method now.

So coming back to the initial question... is this even possible, or is an unmanaged implementation (forcing me to write all the data handling myself) be the only alternative?

entry.title: Cannot add Search Help to Custom Field - "No suitable value help key field exists" error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I made a Custom Field in the customizing client of our dev system (S/4HANA Public Cloud - 3 system landscape) through the Custom Fields app. I have a requirement to add search help to this custom field. For this purpose, I made a custom CDS view through the Custom CDS Views app. However, when I try to bind this CDS through the "Value Help View" field, the error message "No suitable value help key field exists" appears:

 

Here is the setup of my custom CDS view:

What am I missing? Any help is welcome. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Consume Odata V2 ord V4 in custom App Fiori deployed on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Good morning,


I am writing this post to try to have some information about the subject of the topic. In particular, I have developed a Custom Fiori application and I wanted to deploy and publish it on the Public Cloud. At the same time, I have activated on the same Public Cloud system an odata of the Business Application Hub via Communication System and Communication Arrangment. When I try to deploy the app with the odata exposed on the system(with the endpoit that i obteined during the configuration), I get an error related to the odata. Is there something I am missing?

The errors that are returned to me are:

The use of Gateway OData V2 Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 0001 is not permitted.

The app uses not permitted services for ABAP for Key Users

Solutions or suggestions?


Giuseppe.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Transportation Order Items custom field extension
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings!

In public cloud Transportation Order Item app Unable to see custom field, after publishing custom field from SAP GUI.

Transportation Order Header able to see the custom field but same way unable to see item level.

so, please help me on this.

Thanks In Advance!

Regards,

entry.title: Enable Google Worksheets in S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are implementing S/4 Hana Public Cloud for a client, who is not ready to use the MS products (Teams, Mail, Excel, Word, etc.,).

For any data migrations or transactional data updates using the Excel sheets in SAP S/4 wanted to be replaced with the Google Sheets. 

Also, when the client wants to extract/download some master data or transaction data from the system by default it does not give an option to download it to Google worksheets.

So we need a way to enable this feature in the SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud for the Google space/Google worksheets enabled.

When I searched for this, I saw some external integrations needed with SAP Document Managed Services.

We also have the BTP and IS service in BTP used for this client. We can leverage these if required for the Google worksheets enablement in the client system SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud.

Any directions to do this are much appreciated.

 

Thank you,

Hanu

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】問題
entry.content:
向各位專家請教關於 S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】，我有以下問題：
1. GUI畫面開啟【調整使用者介面】自行調整UI內容後，可以如何同步給其他USER看到？

2. 在【調整使用者介面】中新增的欄位(如下圖紅框)，有辦法將欄位資訊延伸至日記帳分錄文件中嗎？
以及新增的欄位有沒有可能新增至SAP標準API中，讓外部系統寫入銷售發票時，也可運用此新增欄位？

以上再麻煩專家給予回覆或建議，謝謝。

entry.title: api_warehouse_order_task_2
entry.content:
Hello

I need to use API api_warehouse_order_task_2 for cancel task, I use request 

In body I add this:

{
    "DirectWhseTaskConfIsAllowed": true
}
 
and have error back from SAP:

HTTP request look like:

What am I doing wrong?

entry.title: API ADT DELETE method
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
When exposing an internal table in ADT, the DELETE method doesn't seem to work in any case.
I get the message:

The specified HTTP method is not allowed for the resource identified by the Data Service Request URI.
But POST & GET are okay.
--> I tried with OData V4 & V2 - Web API.
--> use delete is set in table projection behavior.

Did I missed something?

Thanks for your guidance!
Sylvain

entry.title: Custom Flexible Workflow for Reservation in S/4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a way to create a custom flexible workflow for Reservation (Procurement) in S/4 Public Cloud?
If not for Reservation, is there an alternative way to create a custom workflow?

Thanks in advance.
Regards,
Shankar
